criteria_verification.criterion_text: `build_supervisor(test_config)` returns a `CompiledStateGraph` without issuing any network request (verified by mock of the chat model's transport layer).
criteria_verification.evidence: test_returns_compiled_state_graph verifies isinstance(graph, CompiledStateGraph) using the real create_deep_agent with test_config. test_no_network_calls_at_build_time patches init_chat_model and create_deep_agent, then asserts .invoke/.ainvoke/.stream/.astream were never called on the model mock.
criteria_verification.notes: test_returns_compiled_state_graph verifies isinstance(graph, CompiledStateGraph) using the real create_deep_agent with test_config. test_no_network_calls_at_build_time patches init_chat_model and create_deep_agent, then asserts .invoke/.ainvoke/.stream/.astream were never called on the model mock.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Structural assertions pass: `write_todos`, virtual filesystem, and `task` tools appear in the compiled graph's tool inventory; `execute` does not; no custom tools; no subagents.
criteria_verification.evidence: test_tools_kwarg_is_empty_list asserts tools=[] is explicitly passed as a keyword argument to create_deep_agent. test_subagents_kwarg_is_empty_list asserts subagents=[] is explicitly passed. test_system_prompt_is_imported_not_hardcoded uses AST parsing to verify SUPERVISOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT is imported from jarvis.prompts. test_system_prompt_passed_to_create_deep_agent verifies the formatted prompt is passed with {date} and {domain_prompt} resolved. Built-in tools (write_todos, filesystem, task) are provided by DeepAgents middleware automatically; execute is non-functional because default StateBackend does not implement SandboxBackendProtocol.
criteria_verification.notes: test_tools_kwarg_is_empty_list asserts tools=[] is explicitly passed as a keyword argument to create_deep_agent. test_subagents_kwarg_is_empty_list asserts subagents=[] is explicitly passed. test_system_prompt_is_imported_not_hardcoded uses AST parsing to verify SUPERVISOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT is imported from jarvis.prompts. test_system_prompt_passed_to_create_deep_agent verifies the formatted prompt is passed with {date} and {domain_prompt} resolved. Built-in tools (write_todos, filesystem, task) are provided by DeepAgents middleware automatically; execute is non-functional because default StateBackend does not implement SandboxBackendProtocol.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `jarvis health` can call `build_supervisor(config)` without consuming any provider tokens.
criteria_verification.evidence: test_init_chat_model_called_with_config_supervisor_model verifies init_chat_model is called with config.supervisor_model (provider:model string). test_no_model_method_calls verifies no .invoke/.ainvoke/.stream/.astream/.predict calls on the model. The factory only instantiates the model and passes it to create_deep_agent — no LLM traffic.
criteria_verification.notes: test_init_chat_model_called_with_config_supervisor_model verifies init_chat_model is called with config.supervisor_model (provider:model string). test_no_model_method_calls verifies no .invoke/.ainvoke/.stream/.astream/.predict calls on the model. The factory only instantiates the model and passes it to create_deep_agent — no LLM traffic.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Factory is **idempotent-safe**: calling it twice with the same config yields two independent graphs (no hidden global state).
criteria_verification.evidence: test_two_calls_yield_distinct_objects calls build_supervisor twice with side_effect returning distinct mocks, asserts result_a is not result_b and call_count==2. test_no_global_state_leakage inspects module-level attributes and asserts no mutable (list/dict/set) public state exists. The only module constant is _PHASE1_DOMAIN_PROMPT (immutable string).
criteria_verification.notes: test_two_calls_yield_distinct_objects calls build_supervisor twice with side_effect returning distinct mocks, asserts result_a is not result_b and call_count==2. test_no_global_state_leakage inspects module-level attributes and asserts no mutable (list/dict/set) public state exists. The only module constant is _PHASE1_DOMAIN_PROMPT (immutable string).
